question: A 5-man group made up of one tank, one healer, and three DPS is doing a dungeon that was just released in World of Warcraft. Two are plate wearers and two are cloth wearers. At the final boss, both the tank and the healer are casting holy spells. Ice and fire are being used, each one by a different DPS. A bear from the group is attacking the boss. Metamorphosis is cast. The Kilt of the Forgotten One drops as loot, but no one can use it. If all classes were using their class abilities and all classes are unique, what are the five classes in the group in alphabetical order separated by commas?
llm_answer: Death Knight, Druid, Paladin, Priest, Warlock
correct_answer: Death Knight, Hunter, Paladin, Priest, Warlock

chat_log_for_question.content:
=== PLANNING PHASE ===
Before answering, briefly outline your approach (1-5 sentences). This plan will guide your answer.

=== QUESTION (GAIA Level 3) ===
A 5-man group made up of one tank, one healer, and three DPS is doing a dungeon that was just released in World of Warcraft. Two are plate wearers and two are cloth wearers. At the final boss, both the tank and the healer are casting holy spells. Ice and fire are being used, each one by a different DPS. A bear from the group is attacking the boss. Metamorphosis is cast. The Kilt of the Forgotten One drops as loot, but no one can use it. If all classes were using their class abilities and all classes are unique, what are the five classes in the group in alphabetical order separated by commas?

=== CHAIN OF THOUGHT ===
Think through the problem step-by-step before writing your final answer. Show your reasoning before the <final_answer> tag.

Call budget for this question: 1 (this call).

Respond with:
<final_answer>Your answer</final_answer>

=== PLANNING PHASE ===
I will analyze the class roles, armor types, and specific abilities mentioned (Holy spells, Ice, Fire, Metamorphosis, and Bear form) to identify the five unique classes. I will then verify the composition against the armor constraints and the fact that no one can use the dropped mail loot.

=== CHAIN OF THOUGHT ===
The group composition is determined by matching the armor types and unique class abilities to the roles provided. The Holy-casting tank and healer are identified as a Paladin and Priest based on armor and spell types. The bear and metamorphosis abilities specify the inclusion of a Druid and a Warlock. The requirement for two plate and two cloth wearers, combined with the ice ability and the unusable mail loot, confirms the final member is a Death Knight.

<final_answer>Death Knight, Druid, Paladin, Priest, Warlock</final_answer>
